subject: [PATCH v2 1/7] mm: list_lru: lock_list_lru_of_memcg() cannot return NULL if !skip_empty

reviews.author: Johannes Weiner
reviews.summary: Raised concerns about the charging mechanism setting memcg and folio_memcg(), suggesting it's not properly encapsulated. Identified similar patterns in other code that may need addressing.

2026-03-18.patch_summary: Deferred split shrinker patch series, specifically the last patch switching to list_lru.
